MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-30-2022 Continued To Sep-26-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant?S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Naomi Butler, Esq. (858) 375-7385, Ext 1137; naomib@potterhandy.com) of Potter Handy, LLP
for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EDDJ, LLC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings:

Defendant's motion for judgment on the pleadings - being heard a month before the trial date - is denied. The complaint adequately pleads claims for violation of the Unruh Act and unfair competition law. (CACI 3060.) The parties lengthily argue federal disability law, but the Unruh Act cause of action is not so limited. (Cmplt. 8:7-12, 9:26-28.) And, like a demurrer, a motion for judgment on the pleadings must eliminate an entire claim. (Edmon & Karnow, California Practice Guide: Civil Procedure Before Trial (TRG 2016) 7:295.) In any event, leave to amend would have to be granted, and there would insufficient time for further pleadings motions before trial. (CCP 438(e).)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Off Calendar

Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EDDJ, LLC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Off calendar. The cursory Bostrom declaration fails to demonstrate that the parties engaged in "meet and confer" discussions in compliance with CCP 439(a)(1) [parties to identify defective allegations, legal support, etc.].

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
